---
title: "Structural Determinants of Heterogeneous Suicide Mortality Trends"
subtitle: "Data Integration Script"
author: "Tu nombre"
date: today
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Setup — Cargar paquetes

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(countrycode)
library(janitor)
```

## 1. Tasas de suicidio (WHO GHE)

```{r}
suicide <- read_csv("../DATA/RAW/MORTALIDAD.csv") %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  select(
    iso3 = spatial_dim_value_code,
    country = location,
    year = period,
    suicide_rate = fact_value_numeric
  ) %>%
  filter(year >= 2010 & year <= 2021)

cat("Países:", n_distinct(suicide$iso3), "\n")
cat("Filas:", nrow(suicide), "\n")
glimpse(suicide)
```

## 2. Psiquiatras (WHO Mental Health Atlas)

```{r}
psychiatrists <- read_csv("../DATA/RAW/02_psychiatrists_WHO_atlas_clean.csv") %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  select(
    iso3 = spatial_dim_value_code,
    country = location,
    year_atlas = period,
    psychiatrists_per_100k = fact_value_numeric
  )

cat("Países:", nrow(psychiatrists), "\n")
glimpse(psychiatrists)
```

## 3. UHC Index (WHO)

```{r}
uhc <- read_csv("../DATA/RAW/03_uhc_index_WHO_clean.csv") %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  select(
    country = geo_nam,
    year = dim_time,
    uhc_index = index_n
  ) %>%
  filter(year >= 2010 & year <= 2021)

cat("Filas:", nrow(uhc), "\n")
glimpse(uhc)
```

## 4. Exceso de mortalidad COVID (WHO)

```{r}
excess_mortality <- read_csv("../DATA/RAW/10_WHO_excess_mortality_COVID_by_country_clean.csv") %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  select(
    iso3,
    country,
    excess_mortality_covid = excess_mean
  )

cat("Países:", nrow(excess_mortality), "\n")
glimpse(excess_mortality)
```

## 5. Clasificación de ingresos (World Bank OGHIST)

```{r}
income <- read_excel("../DATA/RAW/08_worldbank_income_OGHIST.xlsx",
                     sheet = "Country Analytical History",
                     skip = 5) %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  rename(iso3 = x1, country_name = x2) %>%
  select(iso3, country_name, starts_with("fy")) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("fy"),
    names_to = "fiscal_year",
    values_to = "income_group"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    year = as.numeric(str_extract(fiscal_year, "\\d+")) + 1,
    income_group = case_when(
      income_group == "H"  ~ "High income",
      income_group == "UM" ~ "Upper middle income",
      income_group == "LM" ~ "Lower middle income",
      income_group == "L"  ~ "Low income",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(year >= 2010 & year <= 2021) %>%
  select(iso3, year, income_group)

cat("Filas:", nrow(income), "\n")
glimpse(income)
```
